meta.reconstruction_note: Registration was created after outcome computation for Development Set conversion purposes. In a real Pilot, Registration must be created and committed before Outcome computation.

registration.notes: Development Set sample. HYPE is not on Binance — price data sourced from Hyperliquid candleSnapshot 15m. BTC benchmark is a weak proxy. Selected clock is information_clock because only broadcast_time is known; actual action time (whale position change) is unavailable.
